title: Christine Lagarde: Stablecoins and the future of money - separating functions from instruments
body:
Speech by Ms Christine Lagarde, President of the European Central Bank, at the Bank of Spain LatAm Economic Forum, Roda de Bará, 8 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260511d.htm

title: Philip R Lane: Climate change and monetary policy
body:
Keynote speech by Philip R. Lane, Member of the Executive Board of the ECB, at the Climate, Nature and Monetary Policy Conference, jointly organised by the ECB, the Centre for Economic Transition Expertise (CETEx) and the Frankfurt School of Finance and Management, Frankfurt am Main, 5 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260507c.htm

title: Joachim Nagel: Structural challenges for the German economy
body:
Speech by Dr Joachim Nagel, President of the Deutsche Bundesbank, at the 79th Monetary Workshop, Darmstadt, 8 May 2025.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260511e.htm

title: François Villeroy de Galhau: A long view on monetary policy - three clarifications prompted by three challenges
body:
Speech by Mr François Villeroy de Galhau, Governor of the Bank of France, at the GIC (Global Interdependence Center)/Bank of France Conference, Paris, 7 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260507g.htm

title: Christine Lagarde: Climate, nature and monetary policy
body:
Introductory remarks by Ms Christine Lagarde, President of the European Central Bank, at the Climate, Nature and Monetary Policy Conference, jointly organised by the ECB, the Centre for Economic Transition Expertise (CETEx) and the Frankfurt School of Finance and Management, Frankfurt am Main, 5 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260507b.htm
